name: tracelayer
description: Transparent tracing paper for your screen. A paper-like, always-on-top overlay for Windows.

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json
